prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic portrait of a {argument name="character appearance" default="young woman with dark hair in an updo and pale skin"}, wearing a {argument name="clothing style" default="futuristic black trench coat with silver metallic accents, tactical belts, and a holstered sci-fi pistol"}. She has a serious, focused expression and is {argument name="action" default="interacting with a glowing blue holographic display"} with her raised hand. The scene is set inside a {argument name="setting" default="spaceship command center"} with cool blue lighting reflecting off her metallic gear. Through a large window in the background, {argument name="background details" default="a starry space environment with a fleet of spaceships"} is visible. The image features photorealistic textures, dramatic lighting, and a high-tech sci-fi aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张细节丰富、超写实风格的肖像画，主角是 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着深色优雅盘发的年轻女性"}。她身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="一件时髦的未来感黑色风衣制服，配有精致的银色金属护甲、绑带以及一把科幻手枪枪套"}。她自信地站立着，优雅地抬起一只手，与 {argument name="technology" default="发光的蓝色全息数据界面"} 进行交互。背景设定在 {argument name="environment" default="光线昏暗的星舰舰桥"}，背景中的大型观测窗展示了 {argument name="background scene" default="一支庞大的太空舰队正穿过星云航行"}。电影级布光，焦点清晰，8k 分辨率，科幻概念艺术风格，戏剧性阴影，冷蓝色调。

breakdown.creativeCore: 科幻指挥官全息交互：一张超写实风格的肖像画，描绘了一名科幻角色在星舰舰桥上与全息界面进行交互的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: dramatic lighting]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
